02247|   const calculatePnl = (currentValue: number, tokens: Array<{ symbol: string; valueUsd: number; address: string; chainId: number }>) => {
02248|     const storedCosts = secureStorage.getItem<Record<string, number>>(`token_costs_${address}`) || {}
02249|     
02250|     let totalCost = 0
02251|     const tokenPnls: Array<{ symbol: string; pnl: number; percentage: number }> = []
02252|     
02253|     for (const token of tokens) {
02254|       const key = `${token.chainId}_${token.address}`
02255|       const cost = storedCosts[key] || token.valueUsd
02256|       totalCost += cost
02257|       
02258|       const pnl = token.valueUsd - cost
02259|       const percentage = cost > 0 ? (pnl / cost) * 100 : 0
02260|       
02261|       tokenPnls.push({
02262|         symbol: token.symbol,
02263|         pnl,
02264|         percentage
02265|       })
02266|     }
02267|     
02268|     const totalPnl = currentValue - totalCost
02269|     const totalPercentage = totalCost > 0 ? (totalPnl / totalCost) * 100 : 0
02270|     
02271|     return {
02272|       total: totalPnl,
02273|       percentage: totalPercentage,
02274|       tokens: tokenPnls.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.pnl) - Math.abs(a.pnl)).slice(0, 5)
02275|     }
02276|   }
02277|

02298|     return (explorers[chainId] || 'https://relay.link/tx/') + txHash

02325|     if (!address || !revokeChain) return
02326|     setIsRevoking(true)
02327|     try {
02328|       if (connectedChainId !== revokeChain.id) {
02329|         await switchChain({ chainId: revokeChain.id })

02335|         to: approval.token.address as `0x${string}`,

02340|       toast.success('Approval revoked')

02342|     } catch (error) {

02345|         toast.error('Failed to revoke approval')
02346|       }
02347|     } finally {
02348|       setIsRevoking(false)
02349|     }

02352|   const batchRevokeApprovals = async () => {
02353|     if (!address || !revokeChain || selectedApprovals.size === 0) return
02354|     setIsRevoking(true)
02355|     try {
02356|       if (connectedChainId !== revokeChain.id) {

02383|             break
02384|           }
02385|           console.error(`Failed to revoke ${approval.token.symbol}:`, error)
02386|           failCount++

02389| 
02390|       if (successCount > 0) toast.success(`Revoked ${successCount} approval${successCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
02391|       if (failCount > 0) toast.error(`Failed to revoke ${failCount} approval${failCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
02392| 
02393|       setSelectedApprovals(new Set())

02397|       console.error('Batch revoke failed:', error)
